name: Veggie Flavored Pasta- No Egg
recipeInstructions:
To make by hand, place dry ingredients on a floured surface or pastry cloth. Create a well in the center and add liquid to it. Knead the dough until smooth.
To make with a food processor, combine all ingredients in the bowl. Process for 1 minute until dough forms. Adjust liquid or flour as needed, then process for another 1-1/2 to 2-1/2 minutes.
To use a bread machine, add ingredients into the baking pan and run the dough cycle. Knead for 1/2 minute, adjust dough to form a ball, knead for an additional 5 minutes, then stop.
If using a pasta machine, continue according to its instructions. Roll dough thinly on a floured surface or pastry cloth with a rolling pin. Shape into long spaghetti-like strips or wider noodles. Cut with a pie crimper for decorative edges and twist into bowknots if desired. Allow drying for at least 10-20 minutes before serving.
To cook, add pasta to boiling water (with optional salt) and simmer until al dente. Do not overcook. Serve with your favorite sauce. Create variations by using different vegetables like tomato juice, carrot puree, beet puree, or spinach puree, summer squash/zucchini, winter squash/pumpkin/sweet potato, broccoli, green beans, or vegetarian refried beans. Use approximately one-third cup of the chosen vegetable.
